history.content:

</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2, E) facing down. The cell ahead (3, E) is floor, so I will move forward.

</thought>

FRENTE

<thought>
I am at (4, E) facing down. To reach the goal at (8, H), I need to go left to column D, then down to row 8, then right to column H. So I first turn clockwise to face west.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4 column E facing left. The cell ahead at (4, D) is floor, so I move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE

<thought>

<action>
GIRA_HORARIO

<thought>
I am at (4, D) facing up. I need to go down to reach the goal at (8, H). The path is straight down along column D, which is safe. To face down, I need to turn clockwise twice. So first, I will turn clockwise to face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at (4, D) facing right. I need to go down to reach row 8. Turning clockwise will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>

<action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
FRENTE

<thought>
I am at (6, D) facing down. The cell directly in front (down) is (7, D) which is a safe floor cell. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at (8, H) while avoiding lava. There is no hazard ahead.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7, D) facing down. The cell directly in front (down) is (8, D), which is a safe floor cell. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at (8, H). There is no hazard ahead.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 8 column D facing down. The cell directly ahead is a wall (#). I need to go right to reach the goal at column H. From facing down, turning counter-clockwise will make me face right. So I will turn counter-clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 8 column D facing right. The next cell to the right (8, E) is a floor cell. Continuing forward is safe and leads directly to the goal at (8, H). I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE

<thought>

FRENTE

<thought>

<thought>
